title: Elemental Hegemony
body:
# Elemental Hegemony
This is a modpack intented to be a roleplaying playground for people who want to build and create around the multiple playstyles the new Origins have to offer.

This modpack is meant to be played on a server with lots of people that want to create story and lore by riding, alliances and drama between different races.

## Raiding

You can claim your own chunks but, we wanted to keep raiding as a possibilitiy, so with Create Big Cannons you can build great distance cannons that let you break open the bases from a distance.

But the base will regen itself when some time has passed to respect the people's time.

## Origins

We have eleven origins:
- **Gnar**: based on League's homonimous champion you will build up rage while fighting. Your little form will be agile and fast, while the big form is heavy and powerful.
- **Croak**: anfibious beings that enjoys leaping around and makes tongue attacks.
- **Siren**: mythological being that only breathes underwater but is a feared warrior in land or sea.
- **Size Shifter**: this kind of people can change their own sizes, each size out of the five having unique abilities such as running on water as "mini" or carry people on you head as "giant".
- **Angel**: angels on this world doesn't have their own wings so, in order to fly, they gotta make them. Consuming different materials grow different wings with unique powers.
- **Kraken**: strong deep sea warrior that builds up insanity on its oponents to unleash powerful attacks.
- **Gnome**: forest beings that play around mushrooms and use them in combat to annoy its enemies or heal allies.
- **Mole**: underground creature that enjoys digging around but can get easily blinded.
- **Witchdoctor**: he cultivate its own carnivore plants, feed them, and prepare them for combat. He's also able to shoot potion effects with their painting abilities.
- **Airbender**: they are very agile people that play with the wind. They are fast and disrupting when fighting.
- **Somnus**: winged dream beings that enjoys chaos and debuffing people.
